Your wardrobe,
on your terms.

Rent premium pieces monthly. Wear them, love them, decide if you want to keep them. Buy at a lower price — or return with no questions asked.

Rent first. Decide later.

Try before you commit. Buy what you love at a price that's already come down.

01

Pick your pieces

Browse curated pieces from top brands. Choose your size.

02

Rent monthly

Ships to your door in 2–3 days. Keep it as long as you want.

03

Love it? Buy it.

The buyout price drops every month you rent. Own it whenever you're ready.

04

Not for you? Return it.

Send it back, no questions asked. Swap for something else.

The buyout price drops as you rent.

Rent it, wear it, and if you love it — buy at a price that reflects how long you've had it.

The Wardrobes

The Essentials

Core pieces for the guy who just got the job and needs to look the part. Business casual that works for the office, the client dinner, and the weekend.

The Interview Wardrobe

Built for the offer. Walk into a first-round interview or finance final looking like you already have the job.

The 203

Everyday looks built for Fairfield County. Coastal casual, weekend-ready, always put together.

Summer Edit

Light layers, breathable fabrics, easy fits. Everything you need for a Fairfield summer.

Off Duty

Active pieces that work past the gym. Clean, easy streetwear for every day off.

Why rent instead of buy?

Traditional retail asks you to predict what you'll like, what will fit, and pay upfront. Davenport removes those burdens entirely.

Your style changes. Your wardrobe should too.

Renting means you're never stuck with something that stopped fitting your life.

Try it before you commit.

Wear a piece for a month before deciding if it's worth owning. Buy at a lower price if you love it.

No closet clutter.

Return what doesn't get worn. Only keep what earns its place.

Pay as your wardrobe grows.

Build slowly, rent what you need now, and buy your favorites over time — no big upfront spend.

Ready to start?

Download the app and browse the wardrobe. No commitment until you check out.

Download on the App Store

Available for iPhone · Fairfield County, CT
